source_boundary.basis: Committed implementation headers/source, committed Apple reverse-engineering references, and deterministic token checks.

covered_payload_types.name: ie-assoc-vendor
covered_payload_types.shape: 0x814-byte carrier with IE bytes at +0x14 and length 1..0x800
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: null, zero, or overlength carrier returns raw 0x16; valid carrier is fail-closed without an IE backend

covered_payload_types.name: offload-ndp-ipv6
covered_payload_types.shape: counted IPv6 addresses, clamped to four, link-local seed
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: null or locally absent NDP owner returns raw 0x16 without cache mutation, completion, or synthetic dispatch

covered_payload_types.name: usb-host-notification
covered_payload_types.shape: present/change dwords with conditional change payload
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: null carrier returns 0xe00002bc

covered_payload_types.name: btcoex-profile
covered_payload_types.shape: 0x38-byte profile entry with mode/band/index gates
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: null or invalid band/mode/index returns 0xe00002c2

covered_payload_types.name: btcoex-profile-active
covered_payload_types.shape: active profile dword at caller +0x4
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: null returns 0xe00002c2

covered_payload_types.name: btcoex-2g-chain-disable
covered_payload_types.shape: opaque public carrier; reference SET uses a 6-byte 0x00060001-headed payload
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: null returns 0xe00002c2

covered_payload_types.name: tx-power-cap-quarantine
covered_payload_types.shape: bypass and dual-power carriers are rejected before local pseudo-state
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: null returns 0xe00002bc; non-null input fails closed before synthetic completion

covered_payload_types.name: wcl-action-frame-v1-v2
covered_payload_types.shape: V1 fixed 0x724 command payload or V2 dynamic issue-command frame
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: null or frameLen > 0x707 returns 0xe00002bc

covered_payload_types.name: action-frame-progress
covered_payload_types.shape: progress flag/start-ms owner state plus scan rejection status
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: overdue clears progress; scan reject status remains Apple 0xe00002d5

covered_payload_types.name: ranging-authenticate
covered_payload_types.shape: role at +0x4 and PMK length at +0x70; local null-owner branch fails closed
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: null, zero PMK length, or absent proximity owner returns 0xe0000001

covered_payload_types.name: association-candidates-hidden
covered_payload_types.shape: 0x3ad8 hidden WCL association candidate carrier
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: hidden fallback routes only exact 0x3ad8 carrier; direct null WCL associate returns 0xe00002c2

covered_payload_types.name: bss-blacklist-async-owner
covered_payload_types.shape: 43-byte request; variable async u32 count + 6-byte BSSIDs + 2-byte tail
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: no interface returns 0x66 before malformed carrier 0x16; admission precedes owner cast; SET null returns 0xe00002bc; count >= 8 preserves applied state; GET never writes its caller buffer; empty applied list emits no event

covered_payload_types.name: txrx-chain-info
covered_payload_types.shape: four independent one-byte hardware/active RX/TX masks
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: null returns 0xe00002c2; Intel configured masks have no fallible iovar read

covered_payload_types.name: link-changed-32
covered_payload_types.shape: 32-byte APPLE80211_M_LINK_CHANGED / IOC 156 carrier
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: null IOC getter returns raw 16; event publication is gated on parent transition success

covered_payload_types.name: bssid-changed-24
covered_payload_types.shape: 24-byte APPLE80211_M_BSSID_CHANGED compact carrier
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: zero BSSID is rejected; same-BSS reason 1 suppresses duplicate publication

covered_payload_types.name: wcl-link-state-16
covered_payload_types.shape: 16-byte WCL 0xd8 link-state update
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: raw reason 0 or out of range maps to 0xff

covered_payload_types.name: wcl-scan-result
covered_payload_types.shape: 0x44 BeaconMetaData header plus up to 0x800 IE bytes
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: null controller/node/channel and zero BSSID reject before WCL_SCAN_RESULT publication

covered_payload_types.name: wcl-auth-assoc-complete
covered_payload_types.shape: 0x08 WCL auth/assoc status and reason carrier
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: zero status/reason maps to zero dwords; out-of-range status/reason maps to 0xe3ff8100

covered_payload_types.name: wcl-connect-complete
covered_payload_types.shape: 0xa4 WCL connect-complete event with ten 16-byte records
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: missing controller/HAL/RUN/BSS rejects before postMessage

covered_payload_types.name: driver-available-0xf8
covered_payload_types.shape: 0xf8 DRIVER_AVAILABLE lifecycle carrier with six-dword prefix
covered_payload_types.invalid_semantics: boolean-only payloads are rejected; boot-ready, power-off, and power-on use their distinct reference flags and reason dwords
